mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 1 THEN 'TEXT' WHEN 2 THEN 'EMOJI' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'VIDEO' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS msgType, m.content AS content, m.file_id AS fileId, m.sent_at AS sentAt FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1
